behavior: construct and identity-check one canonical PossibleWorldSpace against one immutable source Env
retain that managym-owned space behind an identity-bound materializer handle
materialize many canonical world indices with their declared seeds and RefreshOpponentCommitment mode without re-enumerating the support per index
return isolated branches with the existing materialize_index semantics
fail closed on source revision, viewer-state hash, space identity, viewer, index, or mode drift
contract.proposed_surface: Env.prepare_possible_world_materializer(viewer, space_identity) -> identity-bound handle; handle.materialize_index(world_index, seed, refresh_opponent_commitment)
contract.required_complexity: one O(S) support enumeration per likelihood root plus O(S) indexed branch materializations

execution_contract.validation: fail before generation unless every copied scientific section is canonically equal to v1 and the repaired provider, runner source, engine source, and extension identities match the new contract
